items.name: Veg Biryani
items.shortDescription: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with veggies & spices.
items.description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with fresh vegetables, spices, and herbs. Served with raita.
items.ingredients: Basmati rice, Carrot, Beans, Peas, Onion, Tomato, Spices, Mint, Coriander

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.shortDescription: Creamy tomato gravy with cottage cheese.
items.description: Soft paneer cubes simmered in a rich, buttery tomato gravy finished with cream.
items.ingredients: Paneer, Tomato, Butter, Cream, Cashew, Spices

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Tender chicken cooked in a spiced onion-tomato masala with a slow-simmered depth of flavour.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Char-grilled chicken tossed in a velvety tomato and butter gravy, mildly spiced.
items.ingredients: Chicken, Tomato, Butter, Cream, Kasuri methi, Spices

items.name: Dal Makhani
items.shortDescription: Slow-cooked black lentils in butter & cream.
items.description: Whole black lentils and kidney beans simmered overnight, finished with butter and cream.
items.ingredients: Black lentils, Kidney beans, Butter, Cream, Tomato, Spices

items.name: Garlic Naan
items.description: Hand-stretched tandoor naan topped with roasted garlic and fresh coriander.
items.ingredients: Refined flour, Garlic, Butter, Yogurt, Coriander

items.name: French Fries
items.description: Crunchy on the outside, soft on the inside — served hot with a side of ketchup.

items.name: Papad
items.shortDescription: Roasted or fried thin lentil crisp.
items.description: A crisp, thin lentil wafer, roasted for a light and crunchy bite.

items.name: Masala Chai
items.description: Strong black tea brewed with milk and warming spices like cardamom, ginger, and clove.
items.ingredients: Tea leaves, Milk, Cardamom, Ginger, Clove

items.name: Mango Lassi
items.description: A refreshing, chilled smoothie made with ripe mango pulp and thick, creamy yogurt.
